title: Khadia nationae
intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant "Khadia nationae". It seems that this plant is not recognized by any botanical or scientific sources. If you could provide more context or clarify the name of the plant, I'll be happy to help you with your request.

However, based on your description, I found a plant that might match your query: "Khadira" or "Acacia catechu". Here's a paragraph about this plant:

Acacia catechu, commonly known as Khadira, is a deciduous tree native to the Indian subcontinent. The health benefits of Acacia catechu include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve oral health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Acacia catechu include catechin, gallic acid, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Acacia catechu include a traditional Ayurvedic medicine called "Katha" or "Khanda", which is used for its oral health benefits and as a mouthwash.
